This implies a precedence relationship: if the message is sent, then those queries must have occurred before. The global scope of the property for every DM_i is captured by 'Globally, _ABSTRACT_VAR1_'. The phrase 'only after' indicates that the route-calculation message (bool_exp3) implies the prior occurrence of the specified queries (bool_exp4, bool_exp5, bool_exp6, bool_exp7).
